data.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ - Updated reviewer-delta-standard.md with: (1) File-Type Routing section for bash scripts, Python code, and markdown/skill files; (2) Project-specific sub-criteria per dimension (jq-free, fcntl.flock, .test-index, /dso: skill qualification, hook dispatcher architecture); (3) Checklist section dimension key mapping annotations. Regenerated code-reviewer-standard.md via build-review-agents.sh.
